segments.text: In amapiano the log drum is the groove engine, and overlapping notes in the piano roll give it that signature slide and bounce.
Keep a continuous shaker and hi-hat loop running to fill the gaps between the log-drum hits for that rolling momentum.
Add subtle swing and ghost notes so the groove breathes instead of sounding stiff and programmed.

claims.claim_text: The amapiano log drum is the groove engine; overlapping piano-roll notes create its signature slide.
Keep a continuous shaker and hi-hat loop running to fill the gaps between log-drum hits for rolling momentum.
Add subtle swing and ghost notes so the groove breathes rather than sounding stiff.
